# Contact Channels

At Acme Shop, customer support is accessible through various channels tailored to meet customer preferences. For immediate assistance, a 24/7 live chat feature is available on the website, connecting customers with representatives in real time. For less urgent inquiries, customers can email support@acmeshop.com, with a response promised within 24 hours. Additionally, a customer support hotline operates Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM, providing direct assistance with potential standard phone charges during peak times.

[Source: customer_support.md#contact-channels]
